programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Squidward gets busted for speeding in his boat (which isn't a speedboat) and is sent back to boating school in 'Boating Buddies'. Then in 'The Krabby Kronicle', Mr Krabs sets up his own newspaper.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it. SpongeBob goes with Mr. Krabs to the Cheapest Crab Convention.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 110
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is messing up Pearl's preparations in 'The Slumber Party', and then in 'Grooming Gary', SpongeBob gives Gary a makeover, so that he can enter him in a pet show. But Gary's not so keen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts. Later, Squidward and SpongeBob have to share a locker.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 111
programme.desc: SpongeBob And The Big Wave: Our heroes find themselves stranded on a tropical island, inhabited by an enigmatic surfing guru named Jack Kahuna Laguna. Guest starring the voice of Johnny Depp.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 112
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes the richest Sponge in Bikini Bottom in 'Porous Pockets', and in 'Choir Boys', Squidward tries to avoid SpongeBob while on his way to an audition for the Bikini Bottom Men's Chorus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Later, SpongeBob and Patrick watch their heroes fight bad guys in a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Mr Krabs enters the world of professional wrestling in 'Krusty Krushers', and then in 'The Card', SpongeBob is determined to get a super rare Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy trading card.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer break at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 114
programme.desc: SpongeBob is determined to find out everything there is to know about Vikings in 'Dear Vikings', and then in 'Ditchin', Patrick persuades SpongeBob to ditch class, but fun soon turns to guilt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Mr Krabs must pretend to be a pirate for a visiting relative in 'Grandpappy The Pirate', and in 'Cephalopod Lodge', SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally get Squidward expelled from a secret society.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mr. Krab opens a Dinner Theater at the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 116
programme.desc: In 'Squidward's Visit', SpongeBob is desperate to have Squidward visit him at home, but Squidward says no, and the store is all out of square pants in 'To Squarepants or Not To Squarepants',

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother. Mr. Krabs uses Gary to find spare change.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 117
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must replace Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy in a 'Shuffleboarding' tournament, and then in 'Professor Squidward', Squidward is mistaken for his much more famous rival.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A monster terrorises Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 118
programme.desc: SpongeBob must find a new home for some unexpected guests in 'Pet Or Pests', and then in 'Komputer Overload', Plankton decides that he's had enough of Karen, and tries to replace her with a new model.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Madame Hagfish puts a hex on the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 119
programme.desc: SpongeBob has to run the Krusty Krab for 15 whole minutes, but is led astray by Squidward, in 'Gullible Pants', and then in 'Overbooked', SpongeBob just doesn't have time to help all of his friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trenchbillies keep them hostage. Squidward's complaints trigger a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 120
programme.desc: Patrick wants a hat, but discovers that wearing a hat is not as easy as it looks in 'No Hat For Pat', and then in 'Toy Store Of Doom', SpongeBob and Patrick stay in a toy store after it closes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery on a runaway train.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 121
programme.desc: A friendly day at the beach turns into all-out war in 'Sand Castles In The Sand', and then in 'Shell Shocked', an accident-prone SpongeBob damages Gary's shell, and must find a replacement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts. Pat learns just enough karate to wreak havoc in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 122
programme.desc: Plankton discovers the secret of attracting customers in 'Chum Bucket Supreme', and then in 'Single Cell Anniversary', Karen gets Plankton a very special gift - but Plankton has to earn it!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 19
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward are accidentally locked in Bikini Bottom's first time capsule. SpongeBob and Patrick build a dream world for Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 123
programme.desc: Truth Or Square: SpongeBob and friends think back to the early days of the Krusty Krab with some never-before-seen flashbacks and celebrity guests in this very special episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say no to anyone, so he orders a product called the abrasive side. Meanwhile, SpongeBob gets a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 124
programme.desc: SpongeBob and friends think back to the early days of the Krusty Krab with some never-before-seen flashbacks and celebrity guests in this very special episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 21
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play Hide N' Seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm in 'Pineapple Fever', and then in 'Chum Caverns', Plankton creates an underground restaurant that rivals the Krusty Krab!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab. Giant sea whelks terrorise the folks of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 126
programme.desc: It's King Neptune's birthday, and SpongeBob wants to make sure his friends and family are there, including his son, Triton. But Neptune and Triton don't get along...

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 23
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Later, Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 997
programme.desc: It's the anniversary of the Krusty Krab! Mr. Krabs calls everyone over early to prepare for the big night. However, a mishap causes the team to get stuck in Krabs' freezer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties. SpongeBob and Patrick discover a lost ship.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 25
programme.desc: A new neighbor moves in and becomes Squidwardâ€™s best friend. SpongeBob helps Squidward prepare for a date.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Squidward becomes the star of his own TV show and Squidward tries to sabotage SpongeBob's big dance audition.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 816
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 829
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to ball with some REALLY WHITE IVERSONS, get messy with the category SAUCIN' ON YOU and show off some KNUCKLE TATS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 719
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, country music star Tyler Farr teaches Rob, Chanel, and Sterling the healing power of "Redneck Therapy," how-to "Suffer In Peace" and what it means to have "Outside Junk."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 819
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Super Bowl 50 Champs DeMarcus Ware and Von Miller join Rob and the crew to try out for the "Swat Team," round up some "Attack Chickens," and file to the IRS to become "Fart Tax Exempt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Tonight on Ridiculousness, comedian Eric Andre returns to check out some "Power Dicks", watch people go tongue to tongue in the category "Unexpected Mouth Mates" and get sticky with his favorite dressing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Olympic Gold Medalist Kaitlyn Farrington joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about "Other Sochi Games", "Pokeaphobia" and what it means to be a "Virgin Larper".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like "Getting Action Figured," fend off the "Antidote Side Effects," and celebrate with some "Masters Of The Dark."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Hampton Yount joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to check out the danger of "Risky Bits", listen to some "Next Level Narrators" and learn what it means to get "Hamspired".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On a very special awards show episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel give out Ridicky Awards such as "THE BIGGEST DICK", "THE FREEDOM FALCON" and "THE GRAND SLAM" to the stars of some of the greatest clips from the last 10 seasons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On a special episode of Major Key-diculousness, DJ Khaled teaches Rob, Chanel and Sterling how to be GRATEFUL, how to avoid THEY and how to get LOST AT SKI.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 825
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 727
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Chris "Drama" Pfaff sits down with Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Fully Reckless," go on some "Sketchy Flights" and get saved in time by "Life Savers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Big Baby D.R.A.M. joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get into some BAD BROCCOLI, learn how to speak UNCLISH and fend off a few URBAN PREDATORS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 718
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motocross champion Ryan Villopoto joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to learn when it's "Time To Retire," start some "Workplace Throwdowns"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When ditzy cheerleader Brittany invites Daria to a party with the popular kids, Quinn reveals that she'll also be attending the party.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A New York Department of Integration social worker helps supernatural creatures adapt to city life.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The roommates gather for a very special clip show reunion sit-down with The Producer.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Quinn feels so pressured to get plastic surgery after another Fashion Club member gets a nose job that she pulls Daria out of class to go to a consultation with her.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are preparing for Yaksmas, the wonderful holiday where Stinky Weezelteats and his sidekick Yak visit and leave great gifts, such as hot link sausages and pre-chewed gum.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr. Sloan have contact with a contagious victim of a genetically altered smallpox strain.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A skater stages an attack on herself to win endorsements, then ices her accomplice---and frames her rival for the killing.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 10

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 36
programme.desc: It's Heston Blumenthal week on MasterChef Australia! Heston takes the top 12 contestants on a road trip through regional Victoria, first stop is the mighty Murray River in Swan Hill.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Contestants split into pairs have 75 minutes to cook one main and one dessert that must incorporate the element of earth. The least impressive team will then need to cook off to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 38
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia judges and Heston Blumenthal welcome the eight contestants to the Mildura salt pan. The contestants must cook dishes inspired by air in teams of four.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Contestants have 60 minutes to cook a savoury dish inspired by fire. The two least impressive dishes must then cook off to avoid the elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Contestants have 75 minutes to cook a delicious dish to avoid elimination. Later, Heston Blumenthal's MasterClass shows how to cook a tasty BBQ leg of Mallee lamb.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Contestants have an hour to create a dish from the Mystery Box ingredients, with only three dishes to be tasted. The maker of the winning dish will receive an advantage in the invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 42
programme.desc: The contestants have 3 hours & 45 minutes to recreate Paul Carmichael's bajan fish fry from Momofuku Seiobo. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 43
programme.desc: The three best performers from the invention test now compete for a chance at immunity. Will our amateur cook have what it takes to out-perform one of Australia's best chefs?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 44
programme.desc: Split into pairs, each team must make two plates of the same dish and they must be identical, but they will not be able to see or taste what their team mate is cooking.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 45
programme.desc: The bottom four contestants from the team challenge now must cook off and produce a spectacular dish to stay alive in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 46
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia is about to get even bigger as the competition travels to the land of the cherry blossom, Japan. Contestants must explore Tokyo to find ingredients for the mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Each of the eight contestants will have to conceive, cook and deliver one course as part of an eight-course Kappo-style degustation for some of Tokyo's food elite.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 48
programme.desc: The winning contestants from the invention test and the Kappo challenge now have a chance to fight it out for immunity in view of Mount Fuji at the Obuchi Tea Plantation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 49
programme.desc: The judges welcome contestants to the heart of Shinjuku, where Tokyo comes alive at night. Contestants will be cooking at a local alleyway packed with street stalls to feed hundreds of hungry diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 50
programme.desc: The losing team from the Yokocho street stall challenge must cook off to stay in the competition. Contestants must cook a dish that celebrates where they have come from and where they are going.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 24 Australians arrive on the tropical island of Samoa ready to outwit, outplay and outlast each other in order to win the half a million dollar prize and the title of sole survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The tribes compete in an Immunity Challenge to avoid tribal council where they will be forced to vote a team mate off the island. Who will be the second contestant to leave the island?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A physical Reward Challenge will push the tribes to their limits for a tarp & cushions. Later, the Immunity Challenge sees the tribes compete on a puzzle to avoid heading to Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 4

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Facing elimination, the three tribes head to the Immunity Challenge. Which team will return to camp triumphant and which teams will be left to ponder what happened at Tribal Council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The tribes are still reeling after last night's tribal council but will need to put their differences aside and unite to compete in an epic Immunity Challenge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The reward challenge will set tummies rumbling as the contestants compete for a BBQ feast. In the Immunity challenge each tribe will be challenged to carry their own weight to avoid tribal council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Last night's losing tribe is on edge after another tense elimination. One contestant is feeling increasingly insecure about their spot in the tribe. Will they be eliminated next?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: As the dust settles from last night's shock tribal council result, some tribe mates are feeling anxious about their position in the game and scramble to make new alliances.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: One tribe mate is left feeling guilty and in shock after last night's tribal council. The result has caused a rift in the tribe and a very obvious division between some tribe mates.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After receiving a vote at tribal council, one tribe member is shocked after surviving the vote. They are hurt and angry, but do they have the numbers to seek revenge?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lucy lays her cards on the table. Mario seeks some advice from his brother in law. Lydia sets the record straight. and the boys launch a full scale operation to retrieve what is rightfully Arg’s!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cara gives her little brother some sisterly advice. Mick is told a friend of his is hitting-on a Honey. Joey tries to find Arg a date and the Netball team is decided.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kirk seeks some professional help. Mario bares all to win back Lucy’s affection. Arg goes on a blind date and Ricky makes a proposal.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg does a runner. Chloe plays her first DJ set and Mario and Tom K receive a shocking picture.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bobby and Danni have a row. Arg plays his biggest gig yet.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Gemma holds a singles night. Joey becomes a superhero. The boys become spies and Charlie drops a bombshell.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Arg changes his image. The girls have their first netball match. Gemma gets knocked back and Bobby tries his luck in lederhosen.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: There’s double trouble, the patter of tiny feet and lots of real-life drama, plus a birthday night to remember for all the wrong reasons for Lucy & Mario

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As the dust settles on Sunday’s explosive episode, what next for Lucy and Mario? Gemma launches her brand new diet club, Bobby’s quest to become a dad continues plus could there be the patter of tint feet for Lauren and Kirk…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: All the latest drama from Essex as Lucy searches for the truth about Mario, Gemma’s Diet Club continues on horseback, Joey starts recruiting staff for his brand new shop, and could it be third time lucky for Kirk and Lauren…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. Lucy heads off on a mystery date… Danny Walia tries his luck with a visit to a model agency.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. After their twitter rant – what next for Lucy and Mario? The cast celebrate Mother’s Day Essex-style,.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tom Pearce takes new girl Abi on a surprise date. Arg comes to the rescue of a new homeless Gemma. And tempers fray between Bobby and Gemma at Ricky’s Comedy night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg enlists the services of Charlie and Bobby for his St Patrick’s night party. Gemma faces a few home truths. Sparks fly as Jasmin and Ricky come to blows, and tongues are wagging as some hot new boys come to town…

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: James continues his lucky streak with the ladies. Unlucky in love Sophie is played for a mug. Gary persuades Charlotte to return... but has she managed to get over him as she had hoped? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: The 'cheer us all up' party ends in carnage as Charlotte tries to move on and the boys exchange blows. Vicky and Ricci make their relationship official with jaw dropping consequences... (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Ricci and Gary rock the house, leaving Vicky and Charlotte stunned. Meanwhile, the girls set off on a road trip tackling a colonic, Geordie Style, and it all ends in tears before bedtime! (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The honeymoon period is over as Vicky and Ricci split. Rebecca reveals her secret party trick, much to Jay's delight, whilst Gary comes clean with Charlotte. It's pure mental like! (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the gang's time in the house, and hardly any relationships are left intact. Vicky and Ricci move on, Sophie gets dumped and Jay leaves a bad taste in Rebecca's mouth. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 250
programme.desc: The Reunion brings the cast and their friends & families together to find out what really went down during series 2. Host Russell Kane will rummage through the tensions, passions, laughter and tears.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: It's time to swap the grey river Tyne for the crystal blue waters of Cancun, Mexico for the carnage of Spring break! Vicky and Ricci are loved up, whilst Jay is missing the love of his life. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: It's the final few days of spring break and the house is rocked by the loss of yet another member. In the last hours, to the disbelief of everyone, Ricci plans his proposal to Vicky. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: The gang throw Ricci and Vicky an engagement party to remember. There'll be booze and banter aplenty, but it turns into a night that everyone will remember for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With Ricci and Sophie having been asked to leave the house, the rest of the Geordie Shore gang decide a road trip to Liverpool is in order to check out the clubs and talent.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore house is a far from happy place with Vicky and Sophie still not talking and the rest of the house caught in the divide... it's stormy seas ahead at the Shore.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: Peace has finally been restored in the house now that Vicky and Sophie have made up, but nothing lasts forever and when Ricci sees red on a family night out, disaster strikes.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The LB hotties head from the beach to the slopes to cheer up Jessica after Jason calls them dunzo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Valentine's Day brings nothing but trouble for Jessica who's still desperately hanging on to Jason (whose heart is clearly elsewhere).

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's time to suit up for the LB Winter Formal and nothing causes more drama than a girl asks boy dance. Drama is what Jason gets when he goes with Alex M not Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jason and Talan stir up all kinds of trouble when their eyes start to wander from their girlfriends Jessica and Taylor.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 3

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Love and Laguna Beach mix like chocolate and onions. Things with Stephen and Kristin are dunzo, but what about him and LC? And rumors about Jason and Alex M abound.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's Christmas break in Laguna Beach. Kristin has ruled the school, LC is leaving San Francisco and the drama is all around.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Free from school, the gang lives up their last summer together, but when they gather for a final barbeque at Trey's house, the reality of leaving Laguna and each other starts to sink in.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Graduation day is here and the seniors spend time with their families getting ready for the big event. Through a Senior Video Project, the seniors reveal their personal thoughts on graduation, senior year, and life after Laguna.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's prom time, and while everyone is caught up with who's going with whom, which pair of Charles David shoes look best with their dress, and how to fit everyone in the stretch Hummer-limo, Kristin's biggest concern is a drama-free night with Stephen.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After the craziness of Cabo, Kristin invites Stephen to a Blink 182 concert with the hopes of getting back together. LC, Lo, Trey and Dieter also hit the show and when an outsider insults LC and Lo's character, Trey steps up in their defense.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Morgan throws Christina an 18th-birthday bash, she cuts LC and Lo from the guest list, so bumping into them the next day at the nail salon was sweet irony. Christina and Morgan then head to NYC for their spring break trip.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When LC, Stephen and Trey check out a designer fashion show in LA, LC watches Stephen's attention turn from fashion to fashion models.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The love triangle between Stephen, Kristin, and LC is becoming more obvious, and each of them is really starting to feel the pressure.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Their senior year is winding down and the kids from Laguna Beach are just getting started for their summer of fun...and drama.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2821

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2822
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2826

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2830

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2831

programme.title: Episode 6

programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings.

programme.desc: Deadly Women are not the women you expect.

programme.desc: Teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and a slammed bedroom door.

programme.title: Episode 15

programme.title: Episode 16

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Texas, glamourous mother Darlie reports a vicious intruder attack that has left two of her young sons dead. When detectives begin their investigation, there are suspicions about how true her story is.

programme.title: Episode 2
programme.desc: Crips gang leader Christina and her crew murder a young woman in a ritualistic initiation ceremony. Plus, a wife pushes her sadistic sexual fantasies to the limit.

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Discovering why Sunday school teacher Melissa raped and killed her neighbour's little daughter and how Tiffany persuaded her lover to bury an elderly couple alive.

programme.title: Episode 5
programme.desc: How did Queen Poisoner Lydia murder three husbands and seven children; why did granny Velma slaughter her husbands and friends; and did Paula kill her daughters?

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: An exploration of why bank robber Marjorie kills a pizza delivery boy with a pipe bomb; why Kim strangles a couple to death instead of paying back the $300 she owes them.

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: An examination of what prompts Amber to shoot her husband in the head; how Kate disposes of her elderly employer's body; why Wendi murdered her terminally ill husband.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: What happens when a bride loves money more than her groom? Discover how Josephine convinced her lovers to commit murder and why con artist Elisa poisoned her husband.

programme.title: Episode 9
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion, it can drive women to unthinkable crimes of passion. Hate however, is loves gloomy shadow, and it too can drive women into the darkness of their minds where a callous plot to kill is hatched. These Deadly Women, once a vision in white, become their husbands blackest hour when murder is their escape from an ‘Inconvenient Marriage’.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A routine run on a quiet weekday morning would lead to a gruesome discovery and thrust investigators into one of Australia’s most bizarre murders.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 1

programme.desc: After a suspicious rise in Russian diplomats visiting the State Department, the FBI follows mysterious radio frequencies.

programme.desc: The FBI and DIA team up to capture Senior Analyst Ana Montes for allegedly passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 8

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A prison nurse kills a guard to spring her inmate lover from jail plus great train robber Ronnie Bigg's daring escape and 10,000 days on the run.

programme.desc: Queensland Cat Protection Society president Kathleen Marshall is found brutally stabbed to death.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In the UK, a sociopath bomber uses a hand-made key to open a door to freedom.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Patricia Byers and her partner of three years, John Asquith, were enjoying a romantic evening for two aboard the luxury cabin cruiser Misty Blue.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Con man Joe Hunt forms an investment club with wealthy young men. The Ponzi scheme leads to murder when Hunt gets involved with Ron Levin, a notorious con man, himself.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Airing as a part of domestic violence awareness week - this film tells the dramatic and shocking story of Mario Celaire - a man who viciously assaulted two women he claimed to love.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Murder-for-hire is a complex crime. Solving it means finding the killer, and whoever paid for the hit. In South Carolina a death first ruled accidental was no accident, but that was just the beginning.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 68
programme.desc: An armed robbery is a terrifying ordeal. When a gang descended on a Los Angeles cash vault, they threatened to kill anyone who resisted. The violent assault was the largest heist in U.S. history and a piece of plastic was the only evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 83
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 109
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 70
programme.desc: When law enforcement officers become targets, no one is safe. So when a crystal meth dealer on the run from the law began shooting cops, it took more than police to stop him.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 74
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 88
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On Sunday, December 10, 1995, Tracey Martini scolds her two boys when she catches them playing near Spring Green Pond by their home in Warwick, Rhode Island.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 71
programme.desc: Women are most often assaulted by someone they know. Near Las Vegas in December of 2000 a young woman became the latest victim of a violent sex offender. Before authorities could locate him, he would add murder to his list of crimes.

programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 27

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 42
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 28
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious 2009 death of world champion boxer Arturo Gatti. When Gatti was found dead in Brazil, police characterized the death as a homicide and arrested his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A report on the November 14, 2006 shooting of Danny Hill, by his wife, Charlene. Charlene claimed that their seemingly happy life together was a facade and that she shot him in self-defense

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 56
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 7
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 52
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The story of Amanda Knox, an American exchange student who was convicted, along with her Italian boyfriend, Raffaelle Sollecito, of murdering Amanda’s British roommate, Meredith Kercher in 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 61
programme.desc: An investigation into the 1999 scuba diving death of Shelley Tyre while on vacation on the Caribbean isle of Tortola. Police questioned her husband and dive partner David Swain about every detail of the dive; autopsy results were inconclusive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 38
programme.desc: A report on questions surrounding the apparent suicide of Jocelyn Earnest, a successful businesswoman who was found dead in her home in December 2007, from a gunshot wound to her head, with a revolver by her side and a suicide note on the floor.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 48
programme.desc: A report about a desolate strip of land between Houston and Galveston where over 30 young women and girls have disappeared or have been murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 39
programme.desc: A report about three Texas housewives, Tammye Markle, Joni Shannon, and Tina Wiley, who call themselves the "Facebook Detectives" and who used the Internet to try to find their friend Lisa Stone, who disappeared from her Dallas home in June 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In October of 2009, 20-year-old Noor Almaleki and Amal Khalaf, the mother of her boyfriend Marwan, walked out of a Peoria, Arizona DES office and were struck by an SUV driven by Noor's father and Iraqi immigrant, Faleh Hassan Almaleki.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report on the murders of Philip Heidt and his son Carey, the shooting of Philip's wife, Linda, and the secret extra-marital affair of Carey's wife Robin with his brother Craig, who has been convicted of the murders of his father and his brother.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report about Harold Landry, a self-made millionaire who left behind his life in Louisiana to pursue a romance with a British woman he met online, and how this seemingly perfect relationship ended when Lucy Landry was murdered at their home in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 49
programme.desc: A report on Canadian filmmaker Mark Twitchell, whose obsession with the Showtime television series "Dexter" turned to reality and led to murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 27
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 11

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Margaret tries to get the 20,000 pounds she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 9

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Catching up with some of the previously featured tenants and landlords. Lesley and Mark's tenant turned out to be a con artist scamming students.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A paramedic with years of experience is crushed under his quad bike on a remote hillside.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Revisiting tenants and landlords from earlier episodes to find out what happened next.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Joy DeSomber and her new husband Joseph Cua are living the good life. But it all comes to a halt when Joseph tells Joy that his dear friends, the Wagners, have been brutally murdered.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Deep in Louisiana bayou country, a man is found brutally murdered in a nightclub. A handwritten note soaked in the victim's blood reads: You gave me AIDS. Police have more questions than answers.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In 2005, Joe found himself in line at the mall when he struck up a conversation with a pretty girl. They were married soon after, but Joe would be the second in a line of future illegitimate husbands.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Lisl Auman was falsely convicted of murdering a police officer, gonzo journalist Hunter S. Thompson began his campaign to expose the brutality, corruption & flaws of the legal system to free Lisl
